title: Coenoemersa volcanica
taxonomy: Coenoemersa volcanica belongs to the class of plants known as ferns, specifically within the division Pteridophyta. It is classified under the phylum Pteridophyta, which includes all vascular plants that reproduce via spores. The kingdom to which Coenoemersa volcanica belongs is Plantae, encompassing all types of vascular plants. This classification places it within the broader group of plant life, but more specific information may be needed for further classification. Further classification into family, order, and genus may require more detailed information about the plant's characteristics and evolutionary relationships.
